items.name: Fairy Axe
items.description: Your enemies won't know what hit them!  Or how!  Or why!

items.name: Hot Pepper Launcher
items.description: That's a spicy pepper!  Shoot red, green, and yellow peppers at your foes. When your foes get hit by a red pepper, they will turn red and run around, flailing their arms uncontrollably! Green makes your opponents vomit greenish bricks. If your foes get hit with a yellow pepper, their speed will be reduced.  Each pepper does 20 damage per hit!

items.name: Monster Fierce Basher
items.description: This aweseome bashing stick has a ton of ways for you to bring the pain to your foes.  If your enemies touch the stick they will take 5-8 damage. If hit by a swing they can expect 10-15 damage. Double click to do 20-25 damage or click and hold to super charge your swing and do 25-40 points of damage.

items.name: Blue Laser Scythe
items.description: The future is blue. Slash this powerful laser scythe to do 30 damage per hit. Click and hold to do some animated swinging to unleash a laser projectile .

items.name: Korblox Bone Mace
items.description: Each swing of this powerful Korblox mace deals 15 damage. KO 3 players and transform yourself into a Korblox character with a super fast walk speed and extra damage capabilities.

items.name: Metal Fists
items.description: Punch with your vicious metal fist to do 15 damage. If double clicked, you swing the fists into each other.  Anyone unfortunate enough to get caught between them takes 50 damage! Click 'Q' to smash at the ground with the fists, creating boulders from the ground. Anyone hit by these boulders is dealt 40 damage. Click 'E' to knock your fists together, creating a shock wave. If hit, a player is knocked back and dealt a tiny amount of damage.

items.name: Njay's Web Blaster
items.description: Everyone knows that Njay writes web code like nobody's business, but did you know he also shoots spider webs that stop people from moving and do some serious damage?

items.name: Rocket Powered Skis
items.description: Click to equip these skis.  Hold shift to use their rocket powered ski boost! Once it recharges at least half way, you can use the speed boost again.

items.name: Zombie Axe
items.description: Does 15 damage per swipe and summons some Zombies to eat your enemies brains.

items.name: Super Freeze Ray 2011
items.description: The only thing strong enough to counter a freeze ray?  A steaming cup of hot chocolate!

items.name: RC Tiny Tank
items.description: Click to spawn your very own remote controlled tank!   Use 'W', 'A', 'S', and 'D' to steer it. Click to fire a blue projectile with an awesome blue fire trail as it flies toward your target. Each hit does 25 damage.

items.name: Static Shock Sheep
items.description: Do androids dream of electric sheep? Equip and this robot sheep will follow by your side. Click on enemies to get him to run up to them and shock them!

items.name: Winged Guitar
items.description: We are jejune stars, with winged guitars.

items.name: Vaulting Pole
items.description: Victory is only one jump away.

items.name: Ghostfire Throwing Daggers
items.description: Spawn several daggers and throw them at different angles to do maximum damage!

items.name: Emerald Hyperbike
items.description: Travel at hyperspeed and leave a trail of burning green light behind you.  Now with improved acceleration!

items.name: Killer Bee Launcher
items.description: Bees?!?  Yes, bees!  Shoot a swarm of killer bees at your foes.  Each shot releases five groups of six bees that will charge at any foes within 25 studs of you.

items.name: Spring Crossbow
items.description: This crossbow fires springs at your foes to do 12 damage per hit. Occasionally you'll fire spring flowers which do double damages.  Spring has sprung!

items.name: Remote Mine
items.description: Remote Mine activating in 5...4....3...2....BOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!

items.name: jmargh's Arm Cannon
items.description: Thar be danger ahead!  Shoot cannonballs at your foes. Hold down the mouse to charge the cannon to do maximum damage!
